overall.description: First-person driving gameplay through a futuristic cyberpunk city at dusk. The player navigates through neon-lit urban canyons, coastal palm-tree boulevards, elevated highways, and tunnels, eventually stopping for pedestrians. High-quality ray-traced graphics with wet reflective roads and dense neon signage characteristic of Cyberpunk 2077.

navigating through intersection with crosswalk markings

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with first-person driving through a dense cyberpunk urban canyon. Tall buildings on both sides are covered in vibrant neon signage and holographic billboards. The player follows a red sedan through the multi-lane street, passing under an overpass structure while other vehicles pass alongside.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal boulevard with palm trees and commercial buildings

events.description: exiting dense urban canyon into open coastal road with palm trees visible
overtaking blue sports car on the right side of the road

agents.ego_description: turning right onto palm-lined coastal boulevard and accelerating past slower traffic

notable_agents.action: blue sports car driving ahead then being overtaken on the right
pedestrians walking along the sidewalk near coastal area

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the right side of the coastal road
low-rise commercial buildings with outdoor seating areas
clear dusk sky visible above the horizon with sunset colors

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions from the enclosed neon canyon to an open coastal boulevard lined with palm trees. Natural dusk lighting replaces the artificial neon glow. The player overtakes a blue sports car while pedestrians walk along the sidewalks, and the sky opens up to reveal the sunset horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway with city skyline views

events.description: ascending ramp onto elevated highway above ground level
maintaining high speed along the elevated roadway with sunset visible

agents.ego_description: driving on elevated highway with sunset visible in the distance, maintaining steady high speed

entered.detail: concrete elevated roadway with guardrails high above street level
distant skyscrapers and buildings visible on the horizon against sunset
orange and purple sunset sky visible through the windshield

segments.scene_description: The vehicle ascends onto an elevated highway, rising above the coastal road. The camera captures a sweeping view of the city skyline against the backdrop of a colorful sunset. The environment is open with guardrails visible on the sides and sparse traffic ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: tunnel underpass with artificial neon lighting

events.description: descending from elevated highway into tunnel underpass
entering darker tunnel section with artificial lighting replacing sunset

agents.ego_description: descending ramp and entering tunnel underpass, adjusting to artificial lighting conditions

entered.detail: concrete tunnel walls with neon accent lighting
overhead artificial lighting fixtures illuminating the underpass
concrete ceiling of the underpass structure

segments.scene_description: The vehicle descends from the elevated highway into an enclosed tunnel underpass. Natural sunset lighting gives way to artificial neon and overhead lights. The concrete walls and ceiling of the tunnel create a narrow, sheltered environment as the vehicle continues forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street with pedestrian crossing and commercial buildings

events.description: exiting tunnel into street-level urban environment with pedestrians visible
stopping for group of pedestrians crossing the road at intersection

agents.ego_description: exiting tunnel and stopping for pedestrians crossing at intersection, waiting for them to clear

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians crossing the street from right to left in front of the vehicle
woman in distinctive red outfit walking across the road

entered.detail: mixed-use commercial buildings with ground floor shops
zebra crossing markings on the asphalt where pedestrians are crossing
storefronts with illuminated signs and awnings along the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the tunnel, the scene opens to a street-level urban environment with moderate pedestrian activity. The vehicle approaches an intersection and stops to allow a group of pedestrians to cross, including a woman in a red outfit. Commercial buildings line both sides of the street with visible storefronts.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with large industrial building structures

events.description: turning left at intersection after pedestrians clear
entering area with large industrial-style building structures and underpass ahead

agents.ego_description: turning left at intersection and driving past large building complex with industrial architecture

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking on sidewalk near the large industrial building

entered.detail: massive concrete and steel industrial structure with exposed beams and pipes
road barriers separating lanes near the building entrance
another tunnel or underpass entrance visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: After the pedestrians clear, the vehicle turns left and proceeds past a massive industrial building with exposed concrete and steel architecture. The environment shifts to a more utilitarian urban area with concrete barriers and another underpass visible ahead. A lone pedestrian walks along the sidewalk near the industrial structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive that transitions from a claustrophobic neon urban canyon into an open coastal vista before descending back into a utilitarian industrial district. It begins by following a red sedan through a dense corridor of holographic billboards and towering skyscrapers, moving under an overpass before the environment suddenly opens into a palm-lined coastal boulevard bathed in the natural glow of a sunset. The camera then ascends an elevated highway to capture a sweeping view of the city skyline against the colorful horizon, before diving back down into the artificial light of a narrow concrete tunnel. Upon emerging from the underpass, the vehicle slows to a stop at a street-level intersection for a group of pedestrians, including a woman in red, before finally turning left toward a massive industrial building of exposed steel and concrete.
